lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: Oh, hello there newcomer. I'm Guild Scribe Verity. Do you need me to explain the work we do here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: So it's nice and simple. Just chat to any of the hunters in here to help them out. They're all following reports that I've split up amongst them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Reports?

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: Indeed. There are all sorts of interesting creatures to hunt out there. Sometimes we get reports of a particularly unique example. When that happens, one of the hunters will set out to find it.

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: If you do decide to take a job from any of the hunters, they'll tell you what type of creature they're looking into. Hunt that creature until you encounter the unique specimen.

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: Once you've caught it, bring some proof back to the hunter that sent you out in the first place. I'm sure they'll reward you for your time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: Nilsal, hunter. Anything to report?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing abnormal today.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does a scribe do?

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: I'm the primary record-keeper here. I organise all of our reports and write up anything important to be sent back to the city.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you go out on any hunts with the others?

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: I wouldn't know what to do with myself out there, so I like to stay back here with my scrolls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many rumours have I completed?

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: Our records suggest you've managed to complete [number of completed rumours] rumours for us!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this spare hunter gear, is there anything I can do with it?

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: Spare, you say? Hmmm.... I'm sure one of the other hunters could benefit from it if you're sure. If you hand it over to me, I can give you some spare supplies in return.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: Would you like me to filter the rumour information a little more than I am right now?

lines.speaker: Guild Scribe Verity
lines.text: Would you like me to filter the rumour information a little less than I am right now?

sections.title: Handing in spare hunter gear or blueprints
